output.sparql:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?termNumber(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT ?female) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT ?person)) AS ?percentage) WHERE {
  ?term wdt:P31 wd:Q170022 ; wdt:P293 wd:Q190005 ; wdt:P1545 ?termNumber .
  FILTER(REGEX(?termNumber , "^[0-9]+$"))
  BIND(xsd:integer(?termNumber) AS ?num)
  ?person p:P39 / ps:P39 wd:Q4047513 ; p:P39 / pq:P2937 ?term .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 .
    BIND(wd:Q6581072 AS ?female)
  }
}
GROUP BY ?termNumber ?num
ORDER BY DESC(?num)
LIMIT 4
